message:
fix: check finish_reason before executing tools per spec 5.6

The tool loop now requires finish_reason == "tool_calls" (or "pause_turn"
for web search continuation) before executing tool calls. Previously,
tools were executed whenever tool_call content parts were present,
regardless of finish_reason. This matches the spec requirement that both
conditions must be true.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
